textByHash.04af75c4b4e1b77ff0e7feb9d6b16411736548f9: To mine, simply tap on a rock that contains ore while you have a pickaxe with you, and you will keep mining the rock until you manage to get some ore, or until it is empty.
textByHash.0c18ecf5e45c91a414014fcf26819f2166929153: Now that you've got a bar, you can smith it into a weapon. To smith something, you need a hammer and an anvil. There's some anvils just here that you can use. See if you can make a bronze dagger.
textByHash.0c4d3facf5977bbc88b6eed8ea59eac890706d27: Earlier I gave you a bronze pickaxe, which is the most inefficient pickaxe available, but is perfect for a beginner.
textByHash.141b97d18d02a0676ced84202f22b32d736f475b: See if you can use the anvil here to make a bronze dagger.
textByHash.1e8b7dc4418b466c97d48a704be02bd7efef0403: Take the hammer I gave you, or buy a new one from a general store, and proceed to a nearby anvil.
textByHash.216ff8523a5fee8df146dd57ec2dea457d131959: Certainly. To mine you need a pickaxe. Different pickaxes let you mine more efficiently.
textByHash.2c14d751db2c0e70fe5d802acff9a428fa0f6520: Some metals, such as iron, contain impurities and can be destroyed during the smelting process in a traditional furnace, but magical heat does not destroy them.
textByHash.2c992f2fd60edb52719590ec55bfc0aff616418a: As well as letting you smelt ore anywhere, it has a guaranteed success rate in smelting all ores.
textByHash.3b047369cfd0ce111ef8adcb90e4a20516413403: The better the pickaxe you use, the faster you will get ore from the rock you're mining.
textByHash.3e3482336bc127b702d25a05fd18731a1ecb958c: Also, the better the pickaxe the higher the Mining level required to use it will be. Was there anything else you wanted to hear?
textByHash.47f377ef30a6f47e97d5dac3600b6c29488500f1: To mine, simply click on a rock that contains ore while you have a pickaxe with you, and you will keep mining the rock until you manage to get some ore, or until it is empty.
textByHash.5aa7ad58d2b6cc4ea854ba81e66d96f7e8bd09c7: Earlier I gave you a bronze pickaxe. It's the most inefficient pickaxe available, but it's perfect for a beginner.
textByHash.5e6efaaad07fbdbf4b15e517bd5adbfaed7fdd0b: You will be able to buy better pickaxes from the Dwarven Mine when you reach the mainland, but they can be expensive.
textByHash.5fa936aa8931c9788a98204f763643aa9e1ae24f: Mining is very simple, all you need is a pickaxe. The rocks around here contain tin and copper. Why don't you get started by mining some?
textByHash.68c0f23e22295da9a7036763b778c7207a360dc5: Now that you have some ore, you should smelt it into a bronze bar. You can use the furnace over there to do so.
textByHash.6c73a943155a7ffc834b2b5d20442b6eeca040df: Furnaces are expensive to build and maintain, so there are not that many scattered around the world. I suggest when you find one you remember its location for future use.
textByHash.6cc35d9fceb29a479d1b79c2a06aaa834e089ea3: By using a metal bar on an anvil you will be presented with a screen showing the objects you are able to smith at your current level.
textByHash.7ddea60a5839bd4a6a337c5651b65f497958b542: The higher Smithing level you are, the better quality the metal you can work with. You start off on bronze and work your way up as your smithing skills increase.
textByHash.815d645fcf4b380b200dcff029bb32b3e86e27f4: Would you like me to recap anything?
textByHash.8d9a65df0da41fe433866e200cafcc59b82bb7a3: An alternative to using a furnace to smelt your ore is to use high-level magic to do it.
textByHash.a73bd42ddbd488dd8dc44135bf60a93a5287ed96: Smelting is very easy. Simply take the ores required to make a metal to a furnace, then use the ores on the furnace to smelt them into a bar of metal.
textByHash.a7d4c5c0ff72984302760f9f8bf62d378d30b748: Ok then. My name is Dezzick and I'm a miner by trade. Let's teach you how to mine.
textByHash.acabee2a92ad745b90e05dae44c5b7b21087aca2: It's a pretty straightforward skill as I'm sure you discovered while making me that lovely bronze dagger.
textByHash.af0d19a03286916739dadc64933fc0c3a8b502bc: Hi there. You must be new around here. So what do I call you? 'Newcomer' seems so impersonal, and if we're going to be working together, I'd rather call you by name.
textByHash.b80667c36385c0301057a1fe145aae8846de177e: The rocks around here contain tin and copper. You should try mining some.
textByHash.e0d8bd3bf66534ed2bae170c127dd9e29e0ead57: When you have acquired enough bars of the metal you wish to work with, you are ready to begin smithing.
